title: Einar Tangen on Irans perspective in the conflict
transcript_html:

Transcript

Iran does not trust the US because it used the supposed peace negotiations as subtraes for attacks and uh as a result they really don't want to sit down with the US as it is currently uh put together. What they're interested in is seeing a US that is severely weakened coming to the table and being irrational and reasonable about what you know how this is uh going to be settled. So they they have you know their supreme leader who was also their religious leader has

been killed along with many others. This is not something that's going to go away. He's been martyed. He was 86 years old. He was killed in his compound along with a number of his family members. And now his his family member is the new uh supreme um leader. And he has already started saying that yes I'm you know our only choice is nuclear weapons and we are going to fight this to the bitter
